# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent linkerd policy default allow.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default-deny-policy
  namespace: service-mesh
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd-policy-framework
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Default deny authorization policy for service mesh namespace"
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta3
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default-deny-admin-port
  namespace: service-mesh
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd-policy-framework
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Default deny policy for admin ports"
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: 9990
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all
  namespace: service-mesh
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd-policy-framework
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Deny all traffic by default - explicit allow required"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: default-deny-policy
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-identity-required
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mesh-identity-required
  namespace: service-mesh
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd-policy-framework
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Require valid mesh TLS identity for all service communication"
spec:
  identityRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: allowed-service-account
      namespace: service-mesh
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: health-check-allow
  namespace: service-mesh
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd-policy-framework
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Allow kubelet health probes only on designated probe path"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: default-deny-admin-port
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: kubelet-network
      kind: NetworkAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: kubelet-network
  namespace: service-mesh
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd-policy-framework
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Restrict network access to cluster-internal kubelet CIDR only"
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: 10.0.0.0/8
    - cidr: 172.16.0.0/12
    - cidr: 192.168.0.0/16
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: restrict-probe-paths
  namespace: service-mesh
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd-policy-framework
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/description: "Restrict allowed HTTP paths for health probes"
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: default-deny-admin-port
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /ready
            type: Exact
          method: GET
        - path:
            value: /live
            type: Exact
          method: GET
